name: pyaigis
summary: The open-source firewall for AI agents. Block prompt injections, jailbreaks, and data leaks before they reach your LLM. Multi-layer defense, agent-era security (MCP/Capability), US/CN/JP/EU compliance. Zero-dependency core.
